BASE.name: ATTACK_VECTOR
BASE.justification: Apex classes can be invoked through network-accessible Salesforce flows/endpoints.

BASE.name: ATTACK_COMPLEXITY
BASE.justification: Missing explicit sharing can lead to unintended default behavior without complex exploitation steps.

BASE.name: PRIVILEGES_REQUIRED
BASE.justification: Requires a user able to access the logic path that relies on sharing behavior.

BASE.name: SCOPE
BASE.justification: Impacts remain within the org boundary.

BASE.name: CONFIDENTIALITY
BASE.justification: Accidental default sharing context can expose records unexpectedly.

BASE.name: INTEGRITY
BASE.justification: Integrity impact depends on whether DML occurs under elevated context.

TEMPORAL.name: EXPLOIT_CODE_MATURITY
TEMPORAL.justification: Demonstrable by invoking the class under different user contexts.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_ATTACK_VECTOR
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Apex classes can be invoked through network-accessible Salesforce flows/endpoints.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_ATTACK_COMPLEXITY
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Missing explicit sharing can lead to unintended default behavior without complex exploitation steps.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_PRIVILEGES_REQUIRED
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Requires a user able to access the logic path that relies on sharing behavior.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_SCOPE
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Impacts remain within the org boundary.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_CONFIDENTIALITY
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Accidental default sharing context can expose records unexpectedly.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_INTEGRITY
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Integrity impact depends on whether DML occurs under elevated contex.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: INTEGRITY_REQUIREMENT
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Integrity is important but depends on write paths.
